title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
description: Application service unable to acquire database connections. Connection pool exhausted causing cascading failures across multiple services.
logs: 2026-03-10T14:20:00Z [ERROR] Failed to connect to database: Connection refused - postgresql://db.internal:5432/userdb
2026-03-10T14:20:15Z [ERROR] Could not acquire database connection from pool within 5000ms
2026-03-10T14:20:30Z [ERROR] Connection pool exhausted: all 100 connections in use
2026-03-10T14:21:00Z [ERROR] FATAL: remaining connection slots are reserved for non-replication superuser connections
2026-03-10T14:21:15Z [ERROR] max_connections limit reached on PostgreSQL server
2026-03-10T14:21:45Z [ERROR] Database query timeout after 30000ms: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id=$1
2026-03-10T14:22:05Z [CRITICAL] Circuit breaker OPEN for database calls - failing fast
